name: Southeast Financial Credit Union
description_short: Southeast Financial Credit Union is a federally insured credit union offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and wealth management services to members nationwide.
description_long:
Southeast Financial Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). The organization provides comprehensive financial services including deposit accounts, lending products, investment options, and insurance solutions through its website and physical locations. The credit union maintains routing number 264081179 and emphasizes digital accessibility through online banking, mobile apps, and digital wallet capabilities.

The institution offers a full suite of consumer banking products: savings and checking accounts, certificates of deposit, IRAs, money market accounts, credit cards with rewards programs, auto loans (new/used cars and RVs at stated rates), personal loans, mortgage loans, home equity products, and business loans. They also provide wealth management services through Southeast Financial Wealth Management, auto and home insurance, life insurance, warranties, and trust services. The credit union features tools like bill pay, e-statements, remote deposit, FICO score programs, and purchase rewards through their digital platforms.

Southeast Financial distinguishes itself through member-focused features including a rewards checking account program, promotional rates on certificates (7 and 11-month terms advertised), competitive auto loan rates (3.50% APR for new cars, 4.00% for used vehicles), RV financing options, and a vehicle finder tool. The institution actively promotes fraud protection through automated alerts and has issued public fraud alerts warning members about scam calls. They offer educational seminars and webinars, maintain a community engagement program (CommUnity), provide a scholarship program, and host a "Money Talks" blog.

As a credit union, Southeast Financial operates on a non-profit, member-owned model rather than shareholder-driven structure, which theoretically benefits members through lower fees and better rates. However, the website provides limited transparency on specific fees, account minimums, or detailed rate schedules. Like all credit unions, membership eligibility may be restricted by field of membership requirements not detailed on the public homepage. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: NCUA federal insurance protection on deposits up to $250,000
Competitive auto loan rates advertised (3.50% APR new cars, 4.00% used cars for 1 year)
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile app, digital wallets, and remote deposit capture
Rewards checking account with purchase rewards program
Member-focused tools like FICO score tracking, goal builder, and money management features
Fraud protection with automated alerts and scam call warnings
Wealth management, insurance products, and trust services under one institution
Educational seminars and webinars offered to members
cons: Website does not disclose membership eligibility requirements or field of membership restrictions
No specific fee schedules, account minimums, or APR details displayed for most products (only auto loans shown)
Limited information about business loan terms, personal loan amounts, or mortgage program specifics
Mortgage and wealth management appear to require contacting loan officers for details rather than transparent online pricing
Certificate rates mentioned as 'special' but specific APYs not provided on homepage
best_for: Members seeking a full-service credit union with competitive auto and vehicle financing
Consumers prioritizing digital banking convenience with mobile apps and remote deposit
Account holders wanting fraud protection, purchase rewards, and financial education
Borrowers interested in comprehensive mortgage and home equity products with professional guidance
diagnosis: Southeast Financial Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members seeking a comprehensive, member-owned financial institution with competitive auto lending rates and strong digital banking capabilities. The primary caveat is that specific rates, fees, and detailed product terms are not transparently listed online—most financial products require contacting a loan officer or account representative, and membership eligibility may be restricted by field of membership criteria not disclosed on the public website.
services: Certificates of deposit with promotional terms
Auto and RV loans (new and used vehicles)
Mortgage loans and home equity lines of credit
Wealth management and financial advisory services
Digital banking with online bill pay, e-statements, and money management tools
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
